_readme: PROOF BANK — the only source of client names, results, and numbers the bots may publish.
Every entry starts verified:false. Daniel flips verified:true after confirming the number is real
(or edits it to the real one). The QC gate blocks any result-metric that is not in a verified entry.
approvedNumbers are derived from verified entries at load time — do not hand-edit that list.
